title: Beyth #1037
definition:
Beth-millo = "house of Millo" or "house of the rampart"

 1) a place near Shechem, site unknown
 2) a citadel in Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-millo = "house of Millo" or "house of the rampart"

 1) a place near Shechem, site unknown
 2) a citadel in Jerusalem

    NASB:  house of earthwork, a place near Shechem, also a citadel in Jer.
